content.text:
Perfect! Now let me provide you with a comprehensive summary of the dev-department plugin structure:

## Exploration Complete: dev-department Plugin

### 1. Directory Structure

```
/home/coding-agent/workspace/plugins/dev-department/
├── src/
│   ├── worker/
│   │   ├── index.ts        (exports types and state)
│   │   ├── types.ts        (core data models)
│   │   └── state.ts        (StateStore class for data management)
│   └── ui/
│       ├── index.tsx       (sidebar and tab exports)
│       └── components/
│           ├── DepartmentView.tsx  (main UI component)
│           └── ProjectHeader.tsx    (project editing component)
├── package.json
├── tsconfig.json
├── paperclip-plugin.json
└── .gitkeep
```

### 2. Core Types (src/worker/types.ts)

**Type Definitions:**

```typescript
// Status types
export type ProjectStatus = "Draft" | "Active" | "Blocked" | "Archived";
export type PhaseStatus = "DraftSpec" | "SpecApproved" | "PRDAttached" | "ReadyForBuild" | "Accepted" | "ReworkRequired" | "Closed";
export type FreezeState = "Locked" | "FrozenDownstream" | "EditableDownstream" | "DownstreamRevisionRequired";
export type ConversationSystem = "Claude" | "ChatGPT" | "Other";
export type ConversationRole = "planning" | "prd" | "architecture" | "review" | "revision";
export type ConversationStatus = "active" | "reference" | "archived";
export type ScopeType = "project" | "phase";
```

**Interface Definitions:**

- **DevProject**: Main project entity with id, name, objective, owner, status, activePhaseId, roadmapSummary, createdAt, updatedAt
- **Phase**: Phased work units with phaseNumber, title, objective, description, status, prerequisites, successCriteria, riskNotes, freezeState, sortOrder, timestamps
- **Spec**: Specification documents linked to phases with sourceRef, version, author, approvalState
- **PRD**: Product requirements documents with similar structure to Spec, including deviationNotes
- **BuildDispatch**: Build execution records with status, buildClass, riskLevel, targetRepo, environment
- **BuildOutput**: Build results with implementationSummary and artifactLinks
- **Review**: Phase review decisions with comments and impactOnFuturePhases
- **RevisionEvent**: Tracks cross-phase impacts when revisions occur
- **ConversationReference**: Links to external conversations (Claude/ChatGPT) for planning, PRD, architecture, review, revision

### 3. State Management (src/worker/state.ts)

**StateStore Class** - A key-value store with methods for:

- **Project Operations**: createProject, getProject, updateProject, deleteProject, listProjects
- **Phase Operations**: createPhase, getPhase, getPhasesByProject, updatePhase, deletePhase, reorderPhases (maintains sortOrder)
- **Spec Operations**: createSpec, getSpecByPhase, updateSpec
- **PRD Operations**: createPRD, getPRDByPhase, updatePRD
- **Conversation Reference Operations**: createConversationRef, getConversationRefs, updateConversationRef, deleteConversationRef
- **Utilities**: generateId (uses crypto.randomUUID)

Uses Map-based storage with namespace prefixes (project:, phase:, spec:, prd:, convref:)

### 4. UI Components

**DepartmentView.tsx** (Main Component):
- Displays list of projects in overview mode
- Shows project detail when selected, including:
  - Project name, objective, status editing
  - Active phase display
  - Phase list for the project
- Status badge styling with color mapping (Draft=gray, Active=green, Blocked=red, Archived=gray)
- Create project functionality
- Mock data placeholder (currently empty array)

**ProjectHeader.tsx** (Project Editor):
- Editable name field (large text)
- Status dropdown with color coding
- Textarea for objective
- Shows active phase badge if assigned
- Save/Cancel buttons with dirty-state tracking

**DepartmentSidebar & PhasesTab Exports** (src/ui/index.tsx):
- Both export the DepartmentView component
- Used as sidebar item and detail tab in the plugin system

### 5. Plugin Configuration (paperclip-plugin.json)

- **ID**: dev-department
- **Capabilities**: plugin.state.read, plugin.state.write
- **UI Slots**:
  - Sidebar item (projectSidebarItem) - displays as "Development Department"
  - Detail tab (detailTab) - displays as "Phases"
- **Entity Types**: project (applied to both slots)

### 6. Dependencies

- React 19.0.0
- TypeScript 5.0.0
- Standard React types

All files are complete and ready for reference. The plugin establishes a comprehensive phase-aware governance system with clear separation between data models, state management, and UI presentation layers.

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add PhaseList and PhaseDetail React components for dev-department plugin

PhaseList renders an ordered, interactive list of phases with status badges,
freeze-state icons, spec/PRD presence indicators, and controls to add, delete,
and reorder phases. PhaseDetail provides a full edit form for a single phase
including all text fields, status/freeze dropdowns, and read-only linked Spec
and PRD sections, plus grayed-out placeholders for Build Output, Review, and
Revision Events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
Both components committed.

**PhaseList** (`PhaseList.tsx`) — renders phases sorted by `sortOrder` with:
- Circular phase-number badge, title, color-coded status badge, freeze-state emoji, Spec/PRD presence pills
- Move Up / Move Down buttons (disabled at boundaries), × delete button
- Selected-phase highlight, "Add Phase" button in the header
- Props: `phases`, `selectedPhaseId`, `onSelect`, `onAdd`, `onDelete`, `onReorder`, `hasSpec`, `hasPRD`

**PhaseDetail** (`PhaseDetail.tsx`) — edit form for a single phase with:
- Editable: phaseNumber, title, objective, description, status dropdown, freezeState dropdown, prerequisites, successCriteria, riskNotes textareas
- Read-only linked Spec and PRD sections (show metadata when present, fallback message when null)
- Grayed-out dashed placeholders for Build Output, Review, Revision Events
- Save (disabled until dirty) and Cancel buttons
- Props: `phase`, `spec`, `prd`, `onSave`, `onCancel`

result:
Both components committed.

**PhaseList** (`PhaseList.tsx`) — renders phases sorted by `sortOrder` with:
- Circular phase-number badge, title, color-coded status badge, freeze-state emoji, Spec/PRD presence pills
- Move Up / Move Down buttons (disabled at boundaries), × delete button
- Selected-phase highlight, "Add Phase" button in the header
- Props: `phases`, `selectedPhaseId`, `onSelect`, `onAdd`, `onDelete`, `onReorder`, `hasSpec`, `hasPRD`

**PhaseDetail** (`PhaseDetail.tsx`) — edit form for a single phase with:
- Editable: phaseNumber, title, objective, description, status dropdown, freezeState dropdown, prerequisites, successCriteria, riskNotes textareas
- Read-only linked Spec and PRD sections (show metadata when present, fallback message when null)
- Grayed-out dashed placeholders for Build Output, Review, Revision Events
- Save (disabled until dirty) and Cancel buttons
- Props: `phase`, `spec`, `prd`, `onSave`, `onCancel`
